title: Visual Purity
description: Modpack for aesthetes: improved graphics without changing gameplay
body:
# **Visual Purity**

![Visual Purity](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91dde34293a4397f86a9d4859e5faba2f88d77ae.png)

### **_Visual Purity_ improves the visuals of the game while leaving the vanilla style**
_**Visual Purity**_ is a modpack aimed at improving the visual experience of Minecraft while maintaining the **original vanilla style** of the game. It includes high quality resourcepacks and shaders that improve lighting, shadows and textures, providing a more realistic and immersive atmosphere **without altering gameplay**. The modpack is **fully compatible with all servers and does not require server-side installation**. Works on versions of Minecraft **1.20.1, 1.21.1 and 1.21.4** on the **Fabric** platform


![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf96402c55e9defdfaf8f4fb4788ec965ea4e0fc.png)

### **Optimization**
With optimizing and lightweight mods, **_Visual Purity_** delivers improved graphics without significant performance degradation, ensuring stable FPS even on mid-range systems

<details>
<summary>Optimization mods</summary>

- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra)

</details>

### **Compatibility with other mods**
**Is the modpack compatible with other popular mods?**
> Yes, my modpack is compatible with other mods. I tested its compatibility with **some** popular mods and everything was fine. Of course with some mods **my modpack may give an error**, but I think it is compatible with many mods, so if you want, **you can use my modpack as a basis for your own**.

### **Update**
The **_Visual Purity_** modpack is planned to be updated regularly to ensure compatibility with the latest versions of Minecraft and popular mods.
